description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: build, test, and deploy. Use the golang:1.8 Docker image for the build and test jobs, each caching the bin/ directory. In the build stage add a build job that sets GOPATH to the project directory (export GOPATH=$PWD) and runs go install -v $APPNAME, caching bin/. In the test stage add a test job that also sets GOPATH=$PWD and runs go test -v $APPNAME, caching bin/. In the deploy stage add a deploy job using the pivotalpa/cf-cli-resource image, caching bin/, that executes sh deployToCloudFoundry.sh and relies on the APPNAME variable defined in the pipeline. The pipeline runs on all branches with no special rules.
